description: Policy for iOS native realization branch aligned to downstream ASH conformance semantics.

rules.name: Upstream Semantic Alignment
rules.description: Branch semantics must align with ASH upstream authority and Aeostara downstream conformance artifacts from main.

rules.name: Native Apple Implementation
rules.description: Implementation remains Swift/SwiftUI/Foundation/SwiftPM/XCTest native for iOS runtime delivery.

rules.name: Protocol-First Modularity
rules.description: Use protocol-based boundaries, initializer dependency injection, and one-way module dependencies.

rules.name: Deterministic Safety Envelope
rules.description: Policy gating, backup, verification, rollback, fallback/containment/safe-halt escalation hooks, and audit evidence are mandatory.

rules.name: No Interpreted Runtime in Product
rules.description: Shipped product paths must not depend on Python or YAML parsers.
